app.name: Resolve
app.short_description: Ticket-aware customer service research with Claude.
app.long_description: Resolve helps agents retrieve cited customer, order, shipment, tracking, and historical ticket information without leaving Zendesk.
app.installation_instructions: Deploy the Resolve Worker, then enter its HTTPS URL, hostname, tenant settings, and secure integration credentials.

shipstation_mode.label: ShipStation API mode (v2, v1, or auto)
